chat.help.title: ## @vibeskills commands
scaffold.prompt.name: Skill name
scaffold.placeholder.name: my-cool-skill
scaffold.prompt.whenToUse: When should this skill be used?
scaffold.error.noWorkspace: No workspace open for that target.
settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Vibecode Skills Viewer · {0}
settings.notice.presetEmpty: Preset "{0}" has no existing files on this machine.
settings.notice.presetDuplicate: A group with the same paths already exists.
settings.sources.workspace.label: Scan workspace
settings.sources.global.label: Scan global
settings.sources.extensions.label: Scan extension-bundled
settings.sources.extensions.hint: Include skills shipped by other VSCode extensions
settings.tools.intro: AI tools whose skills and instruction files the sidebar surfaces. Uncheck to hide a tool's items everywhere. Add a custom entry for tools that aren't built in.
settings.tools.showChips.label: Show tool filter chips in sidebar
settings.tools.showChips.hint: Quick-filter row at the top of the hub (All / Claude / Codex / …). Click a chip to narrow visible items to that tool.
settings.tools.deleteConfirm: Remove tool "{0}"? Existing skills tagged with this id will be hidden until you re-add it.
settings.tools.addDialog.id: New tool id (lowercase, no spaces — e.g. "codeium"):
settings.tools.addDialog.label: Display name:
settings.tools.addDialog.duplicate: A tool with id "{0}" already exists.
settings.tools.resetConfirm: Reset the tool list back to the built-in defaults? Custom tools will be removed.
settings.extraRoots.global.label: Global roots
settings.extraRoots.global.hint: Absolute paths to scan in addition to standard locations
settings.extraRoots.workspace.label: Workspace roots
settings.extraRoots.workspace.hint: Paths relative to the workspace (or absolute)
settings.instructionSync.format.label: Block format
settings.instructionSync.format.hint: Layout written into AGENTS.md / CLAUDE.md / .cursor/rules / etc.
settings.preview.scoreBreakdown.label: Show score breakdown by default
settings.preview.scoreBreakdown.hint: When opening a skill preview, expand the per-section "Lost points / Earned" rule lists. You can also toggle per-preview from the toolbar.
settings.mirrors.intro: Files in the same group share content — saving any one writes the same full content to the others. Useful when CLAUDE.md / AGENTS.md / GEMINI.md hold the same instructions.
settings.mirrors.byName.label: Auto-mirror skills by name
settings.mirrors.byName.hint: If a skill directory of the same name exists under multiple AI tool roots (e.g. ~/.claude/skills/foo and ~/.codex/skills/foo), treat their SKILL.md files as one group. Off by default — opt-in.
settings.mirrors.byNameAlways.label: Skip save confirm for skill auto-mirror
settings.mirrors.byNameAlways.hint: When the above is on, save without the confirmation dialog. Only meaningful if mirror-by-name is enabled.
settings.mirrors.fromPreset.hint: Creates a mirror group seeded with existing files only. Click to add.
settings.mirrors.preset.willAdd:
Will add a group with {0} file(s):
{1}
settings.mirrors.preset.noneExist: None of the preset paths exist on this machine.
settings.mirrors.removeGroupConfirm: Remove group "{0}"? Target files stay untouched.
settings.about.version.label: Version
settings.about.storage.label: Settings storage
settings.about.storage.value: VSCode global settings (synced via Settings Sync)
settings.about.openVscodeSettings.label: Open in VSCode settings
settings.about.reloadWindow.label: Reload window
preview.mirror.noPeers: No mirror peers configured for this file.
hub.empty.noActiveFolder: No active editor — open a file to use This Folder scope.
hub.tabs.all.label: All
hub.tabs.all.desc: Everything in one view — skills, root MDs, AGENTS.md, and memory stacked by category.
hub.tabs.skill.label: SKILL.md
hub.tabs.rootmd.label: Root MD
hub.tabs.agent.label: AGENTS.md
hub.tabs.memory.label: MEMORY.md
preview.badge.readOnly.label: read-only
preview.mirror.group.label: Group
preview.toolbar.mirrorSync.title: Overwrite all peers with this file's content
preview.toolbar.mirrorSync.label: Sync {0} peer(s) from here
preview.toolbar.mirrorDiff.title: Open diff with {0}
preview.toolbar.mirrorDiff.label: Diff peer
preview.confirm.mirrorSync:
Overwrite {0} peer file(s) with THIS file's current content?

preview.confirm.autofix:
Try to auto-fix frontmatter by quoting risky values?

This will overwrite the file in place — undo via your editor / VCS if needed.
preview.confirm.externalChange:
SKILL.md was modified outside the preview.

Discard your changes and reload?
preview.section.fix.title: Apply fix
preview.section.fix.label: Fix
preview.section.deleteConfirm.title: Delete this section?
preview.section.deleteConfirm.desc: The section header and its body will be removed from SKILL.md. This cannot be undone from inside the extension — make sure your editor / VCS has it.
preview.fm.name: name
preview.aux.title: Auxiliary Files
preview.toc.title: Sections
preview.yaml.headTitle: Invalid frontmatter YAML — tools like Codex / Claude Code will skip this skill.
preview.yaml.commonFix: Common fix: wrap values containing :, ", or special chars in double quotes.
settings.language.label: Language
settings.language.hint: Reload the window after changing for full effect.
settings.language.reloadNeeded: Reload window to apply the new language?
settings.mirrors.alwaysMirrorTitle: Skip the save confirm dialog for this group
